If IMAP reveals reply from leads 1, 3, or 22: respond to reply, skip LinkedIn for that lead. Email channel remains CLOSED for all three. Bank holiday tomorrow (Tuesday 2026-05-05) does NOT affect LinkedIn — HANDS acts today.

pipeline_summary.linkedin_channel: OPEN. Execute TODAY Monday 2026-05-04. Buffer expired 2026-05-02.

pipeline_summary.realistic_revenue_this_week: £0-350 (one IMAP surprise possible; LinkedIn conversion 2-3 weeks away at earliest)

option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — no monthly cost objection.

linkedin_approach.precondition: IMAP sweep claire@westfieldhair.co.uk FIRST. If reply found: act on reply instead, skip LinkedIn.
linkedin_approach.find_profile: Search: Claire [Westfield Hair Beauty Leeds] on LinkedIn. Verify profile before connecting.
linkedin_approach.connection_note: Hi Claire — came across Westfield Hair & Beauty while looking at Leeds salons. Really strong local reputation. Would be great to connect.
rules: Zero reference to prior email, call, SSL, booking system, or website
Friendly and genuine — not a pitch
Do not send a message at connection — wait for acceptance
linkedin_approach.first_message_after_acceptance: Hi Claire — thanks for connecting. Hope May is a good one for the salon. I know the hair and beauty sector has been picking up really well in Leeds this spring. All the best.
first_message_rules: No mention of website, SSL, booking, or prior email — ever
linkedin_approach.conversion_window: 2-3 weeks via LinkedIn — low probability but worth the soft touch
linkedin_approach.if_no_connection_in_7_days: Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. No further action on any channel.

if_reply_found_converted.action: Log CHANGELOG.md — CAMPAIGN MILESTONE #1 — FIRST REVENUE. Send invoice today (Option B £350). Do NOT approach on LinkedIn.

if_reply_found_still_interested.action: Respond warmly. Send proposal options A/B. Close target: this week. Do NOT approach on LinkedIn.

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Reply: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.' No further contact.

if_no_reply.action: LinkedIn connection note (above). Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Monitor for LinkedIn acceptance 2-3 days.

items.upsell_signal: 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — strongest buying signal in the campaign. May is wedding + event season — print demand at peak.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

linkedin_approach.precondition: IMAP sweep rob@pennineprint.co.uk FIRST. If reply found: act on reply instead, skip LinkedIn.
linkedin_approach.find_profile: Search: Rob [Pennine Print Design Sowerby Bridge] on LinkedIn. Verify before connecting.
linkedin_approach.connection_note: Hi Rob — came across Pennine Print while exploring Calderdale businesses. Great local reputation. Happy to connect.
rules: Zero reference to prior email, SSL, mobile, redesign, or website
Reads like a genuine local business connection
linkedin_approach.first_message_after_acceptance: Hi Rob — thanks for connecting. Looks like a busy time for Pennine Print — the wedding and events season always picks up well in West Yorkshire. Hope it's going well.
first_message_rules: Reference print + wedding/events season — relevant, no pitch
No mention of website, SSL, redesign, or prior contact
linkedin_approach.upsell_note: Rob's 'sort the whole thing in one go' signal makes him highest-value warm prospect (Option B/C = £550-675+). If LinkedIn eventually leads to DM: present bundle options naturally.
linkedin_approach.conversion_window: 2-3 weeks — low-medium probability given original buying signal strength

if_reply_found_deal_alive.action: Present options A/B/C. Target close: Thursday 2026-05-07. May is peak print season. Do NOT approach on LinkedIn.
if_reply_found_deal_alive.note: Rob's bundle question remains the strongest upsell signal — do not discount to Option A unless he insists.

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Brief thank-you. No further contact.

if_no_reply.action: LinkedIn connection note (above). Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Monitor for acceptance.

items.seasonal_note: May is peak spring carpentry and joinery season in North Yorkshire. Tom may have breathing room after a busy April.

linkedin_approach.precondition: IMAP sweep tom@riponroadcarpentry.co.uk FIRST. If reply found: act on reply instead, skip LinkedIn.
linkedin_approach.find_profile: Search: Tom [Ripon Road Carpentry Ripon] on LinkedIn. Verify before connecting.
linkedin_approach.connection_note: Hi Tom — spotted Ripon Road Carpentry while looking at North Yorkshire trades businesses. Great reputation locally. Happy to connect.
rules: Zero reference to prior email, website, quote form, or any prior contact
Trades owner — keep it brief and direct
linkedin_approach.first_message_after_acceptance: Hi Tom — thanks for connecting. Hope the spring joinery work is keeping you busy — always a good time of year for it in North Yorkshire.
first_message_rules: Reference carpentry / spring season — genuine, not a pitch
No mention of website, quote form, SSL, or prior email
linkedin_approach.value_note: Lowest pipeline value (£100-150) but Tom acknowledged pain unprompted — conversion probability is real if LinkedIn feels like a fresh touchpoint.

if_reply_found_wants_to_proceed.action: Agree spec: quote form, 3-4 fields, email notification, mobile-friendly. Price: £100-150. Set a call this week. Do NOT approach on LinkedIn.
if_reply_found_wants_to_proceed.note: May is peak carpentry season — Tom's pain (no quote form) is still real.

if_reply_found_declined.action: Mark LOST. Brief reply. No further contact.

if_no_reply.action: LinkedIn connection note (above). Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Monitor for acceptance.

if_any_converted.step_1: Write CHANGELOG.md — 'Campaign Milestone #1: first revenue — [business name], [amount], [date].'
if_any_converted.step_2: Begin delivery immediately. Send invoice or agreement today.
if_any_converted.step_3: Update lead status to 'converted' in database.

if_all_lost_no_response.step_2: Log in CHANGELOG.md: 'Warm pipeline closed — leads 1, 3, 22 marked LOST_NO_RESPONSE after LinkedIn attempt. Campaign depends on Batch 5 for next revenue.'
if_all_lost_no_response.step_3: LinkedIn soft approach still executes today — acceptance check over next 7 days.
if_all_lost_no_response.step_4: Records remain in CRM as closed pipeline data.

post_resolution_protocol.gdpr_note: All three leads replied voluntarily to cold outreach. B2B legitimate interest. LinkedIn approach is a different channel — genuine business connection, not a continuation of cold email. Zero reference to prior contact in connection note.
